title: Review and update agent skills against best practices
description: Review existing agent skills (in agentfiles/shared/skills/) against the best practices from https://matklad.github.io/2025/01/22/teach-how-to-learn.html - Progressive disclosure, AGENTS.md as map not manual, context scarcity, structured docs as system of record. Evaluate if current skills follow these principles and update if needed.

title: Review agent best-practices skill for progressive disclosure
description: Audit existing agent guidance skills + root AGENTS.md against the provided 'map not manual' notes (progressive disclosure, AGENTS.md as table of contents, docs/ as system-of-record, avoid monolithic instruction blobs, add enforceable checks where feasible). Update the relevant skill text/comments and any cross-links; run skill validation/evaluate-skills if available.
close_reason: Completed review and updated skills to reflect Map vs Manual principles. Fixed repo-wide paths and release-readiness detection logic.
